sources: SHRM State of the Workplace Reports
German Federal Employment Agency (Bundesagentur für Arbeit)
Japan Ministry of Health Labour and Welfare

boston_ma.name: Boston, MA

hiring_regulations.salary_transparency: Required as of 2025 (employers 25+ must include pay ranges)
hiring_regulations.paid_family_leave: Up to 26 weeks via PFML program

cultural_norms.negotiation_style: Direct but professional, salary negotiation expected
cultural_norms.remote_work: Hybrid dominant (3 days office common), fully remote declining

boston_ma.language_requirements: English (primary). Portuguese useful for some healthcare/service roles.

talent_dynamics.notes: Aging population creates persistent labor shortages

nyc_ny.name: New York City, NY

top_job_boards.name: Indeed
top_job_boards.strength: Highest volume nationally, massive NYC traffic

top_job_boards.name: Glassdoor
top_job_boards.strength: Key for employer branding in competitive market

talent_dynamics.candidate_supply_index: moderate (1.2 candidates per opening overall, 0.5 for tech)

hiring_regulations.salary_transparency: Required (NYC Local Law 32, effective Nov 2022; NY State law effective Sep 2023)
hiring_regulations.paid_family_leave: Up to 12 weeks at 67% pay via NY PFL
hiring_regulations.nyc_specific: Automated employment decision tools (AEDT) law requires bias audits, freelance protection act

cultural_norms.interview_rounds: 3-6 for professional roles, finance can be 8+
cultural_norms.remote_work: Hybrid dominant (RTO mandates increasing 2025-2026), some fully remote tech
cultural_norms.diversity_focus: Very high emphasis, regulatory requirements for bias audits

nyc_ny.language_requirements: English (primary). Spanish highly valuable. Mandarin, Cantonese, Korean useful in specific sectors.

hiring_regulations.salary_transparency: Philadelphia requires salary history ban (cannot ask)

talent_dynamics.notes: CMU pipeline creates strong tech talent but high competition from FAANG
Security clearance requirement creates significant bottleneck for defense roles

washington_dc.name: Washington, DC Metro

talent_dynamics.candidate_supply_index: very low for cleared tech (0.4 per opening)

hiring_regulations.salary_transparency: DC requires pay ranges in postings (2024). Maryland requires on request.

cultural_norms.interview_rounds: 3-5 for private, government hiring process can take 3-6 months
cultural_norms.negotiation_style: Professional, data-driven. Government salaries are fixed GS scale
cultural_norms.remote_work: High remote/hybrid adoption, federal RTO mandates creating tension in 2025-2026
cultural_norms.diversity_focus: Very high, federal EEOC requirements plus strong private sector focus

washington_dc.language_requirements: English (primary). Spanish valuable. Many multilingual roles (diplomatic/international orgs).

us_southeast.name: US Southeast
us_southeast.timezone: America/New_York (ET) and America/Chicago (CT for some areas)

talent_dynamics.notes: Major relocation destination from Northeast; talent pipeline expanding rapidly
Major tech hub growth; HBCU pipeline (Morehouse, Spelman, Clark Atlanta) drives diverse talent

miami_fl.name: Miami-Fort Lauderdale, FL

talent_dynamics.notes: Massive influx of finance/tech relocations from NYC. Bilingual (English/Spanish) is baseline requirement for many roles.

miami_fl.language_requirements: English and Spanish equally important. Portuguese (Brazilian community) valuable. Creole useful for some healthcare/service roles.

talent_dynamics.notes: Fastest growing major US metro; massive corporate relocations driving demand

regional_hiring_regulations.salary_transparency_trend: Not yet widely adopted in Southeast
regional_hiring_regulations.notes: Southeast generally employer-friendly regulations; lower labor costs than Northeast

us_midwest.name: US Midwest
us_midwest.timezone: America/Chicago (CT, UTC-6/-5) and America/New_York (ET) for some eastern areas

hiring_regulations.ai_hiring_law: Illinois AI Video Interview Act requires consent

talent_dynamics.notes: EV transition creating massive reskilling needs; strong union presence (UAW)
Intel fab investment creating massive hiring wave; Ohio State pipeline strong
Eli Lilly massive expansion ($10B+ investment) driving pharma hiring boom
Very low unemployment; 19 Fortune 500 HQs create intense competition for talent

us_southwest.name: US Southwest
us_southwest.timezone: America/Chicago (CT) for Texas, America/Denver (MT) and America/Phoenix (no DST) for Mountain region

houston_tx.name: Houston, TX
houston_tx.language_requirements: English (primary). Spanish very valuable (large Hispanic population). Vietnamese useful in certain areas.

talent_dynamics.notes: Massive corporate relocation destination; strong population growth
Silicon Hills - major tech hub rivaling Bay Area; massive growth but affordability declining

san_antonio_tx.name: San Antonio, TX
san_antonio_tx.language_requirements: English (primary). Spanish very valuable (67% Hispanic population).

talent_dynamics.notes: CHIPS Act investments driving massive semiconductor hiring; TSMC fab bringing thousands of jobs

hiring_regulations.note: Arizona does not observe DST (stays on MST year-round)

hiring_regulations.salary_transparency: Required (Equal Pay for Equal Work Act, 2021 - first state to mandate)

talent_dynamics.notes: Silicon Slopes tech hub growing rapidly; young workforce (median age 31)

el_paso_tx.name: El Paso, TX
el_paso_tx.language_requirements: English and Spanish equally important (80%+ Hispanic population). Bilingual is baseline.

us_west_coast.name: US West Coast
us_west_coast.timezone: America/Los_Angeles (PT, UTC-8/-7). Hawaii: Pacific/Honolulu (HST, UTC-10). Alaska: America/Anchorage (AKST, UTC-9/-8)

los_angeles_ca.name: Los Angeles, CA

top_job_boards.name: ZipRecruiter
top_job_boards.strength: HQ in Santa Monica, very strong locally

hiring_regulations.paid_family_leave: Up to 8 weeks at 60-70% pay via SDI
hiring_regulations.additional: WARN Act (60-day notice for mass layoffs), Cal/OSHA requirements, meal/rest break requirements

los_angeles_ca.language_requirements: English (primary). Spanish essential for many roles. Korean, Mandarin, Tagalog valuable in specific communities.

top_job_boards.name: Y Combinator Work at a Startup

talent_dynamics.candidate_supply_index: extremely low for AI talent (0.2 per opening), moderate for general SWE

hiring_regulations.salary_transparency: Required (Oregon Equal Pay Act, employers must provide salary ranges on request)

hiring_regulations.paid_family_leave: Up to 12 weeks via WA PFML

talent_dynamics.notes: Very high cost of living; difficulty attracting mainland talent; aging workforce
Remote location creates persistent talent shortages; high pay premiums needed

canada.name: Canada
canada.timezone: Multiple: America/Toronto (ET), America/Winnipeg (CT), America/Edmonton (MT), America/Vancouver (PT), America/Halifax (AT), America/St_Johns (NT)

hiring_regulations.notice_periods: 1-8 weeks depending on province and tenure (varies by province)
hiring_regulations.benefits_requirements: Provincial healthcare (universal), CPP/EI mandatory employer contributions
hiring_regulations.work_permits: LMIA required for most foreign workers; Express Entry for skilled immigration
hiring_regulations.official_languages: English and French (bilingual requirement in federal government and Quebec)
hiring_regulations.vacation_minimum: 2 weeks minimum (3 weeks in some provinces after 5 years)

cultural_norms.negotiation_style: Polite, less aggressive than US; benefits and work-life balance valued highly
cultural_norms.remote_work: Hybrid dominant; strong remote culture especially post-COVID
cultural_norms.diversity_focus: High emphasis; federal Employment Equity Act requirements

surplus_roles: new immigrants seeking first Canadian experience
talent_dynamics.notes: Largest Canadian metro; major tech hub growth; strong immigrant talent pipeline

ottawa_on.name: Ottawa, ON
ottawa_on.language_requirements: English and French both required for most government roles. Tech sector primarily English.

montreal_qc.name: Montreal, QC

talent_dynamics.notes: Global AI hub (MILA/Yoshua Bengio); lower salaries than Toronto attract companies but talent competition is fierce in AI

montreal_qc.language_requirements: French required by law (Bill 96) for most positions. English also needed for many roles. Job postings must be in French.

hiring_regulations_specific.language_law: Quebec Bill 96 requires French as working language for companies 25+ employees
hiring_regulations_specific.job_posting_language: Must be posted in French (can be bilingual but French required)

vancouver_bc.name: Vancouver, BC

talent_dynamics.notes: High cost of living limits talent retention; strong Asian-Canadian community (Mandarin/Cantonese valuable)

vancouver_bc.language_requirements: English (primary). Mandarin and Cantonese valuable. Punjabi useful in some sectors.

talent_dynamics.notes: Economy diversifying from energy; no provincial sales tax; lower cost than Toronto/Vancouver

maritime_provinces.name: Maritime Provinces (Halifax, Saint John, Charlottetown, Fredericton, St. John's)

talent_dynamics.notes: Aging population; youth migration to Toronto/Vancouver; growing immigration programs to address shortages

united_kingdom.name: United Kingdom

hiring_regulations.notice_periods: 1 week minimum (up to 1 month standard, 3 months for senior roles)
hiring_regulations.benefits_requirements: NHS (universal healthcare), statutory pension auto-enrollment (min 8% total contribution), 28 days minimum holiday (including bank holidays), statutory sick pay, maternity (52 weeks, 39 paid), paternity (2 weeks)
hiring_regulations.right_to_work: Right to work check mandatory; Skilled Worker visa (sponsor license required)
hiring_regulations.minimum_wage: GBP 11.44/hr National Living Wage (21+), GBP 8.60 (18-20) as of Apr 2024
hiring_regulations.redundancy: Statutory redundancy pay after 2+ years; consultation requirements for 20+ employees

cultural_norms.interview_rounds: 2-4 typical (assessment centres common for graduate schemes)
cultural_norms.decision_speed: 2-4 weeks private sector; 4-8 weeks public sector
cultural_norms.negotiation_style: Reserved but professional; less aggressive than US; focus on total package
cultural_norms.remote_work: Hybrid dominant (2-3 days office common); right to request flexible working from day 1 (2024)
cultural_norms.diversity_focus: High emphasis; gender pay gap reporting mandatory for 250+ employers

top_platforms.name: Totaljobs
top_platforms.strength: StepStone Group owned, strong general board

top_platforms.name: Adzuna UK
top_platforms.strength: Aggregator, govt Find a Job contract

north_england.name: North England (Manchester, Leeds, Liverpool, Newcastle, Sheffield)

talent_dynamics.notes: Manchester emerging as UK's #2 tech hub; lower costs attract London companies to open Northern offices
Edinburgh growing as fintech hub; Aberdeen transitioning from oil to renewables

wales.name: Wales (Cardiff, Swansea, Newport)
wales.language_requirements: English (primary). Welsh language skills valued/required in some public sector roles.

talent_dynamics.notes: Growing tech hub with competitive costs; dual UK/EU market access post-Windsor Framework

united_kingdom.language_requirements: English. Welsh in Wales public sector. Gaelic in some Scottish contexts.
